label: 808 Termination
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 119–66October 1, 2028October 1, 20232018— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 115–268October 1, 2023October 1, 20182013— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 104–2081992— substituted “1995” for “1992”.Pub. L. 102–4571990— amended section generally, substituting present provision for provisions which had: in subsec. (a) directed that the Board terminate on ; in subsec. (b) provided for alternative termination dates; in subsec. (c) required reports to Congress; in subsecs. (d) and (e) required certification of compliance and verification of information, respectively; and in subsec. (f) mandated dissolution of corporations established by the Board prior to its termination.Pub. L. 101–525Nov. 15, 19891988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Board shall terminate on . Upon termination of the Board, the Board shall take such actions as may be required to provide for the dissolution of any corporation established by the Board under . The Board shall set forth, in its bylaws, the procedures for dissolution to be followed by the Board.”Pub. L. 100–674section 806(g) of this titleNovember 16, 19881985— substituted “on ” for “six years after ”.Pub. L. 99–161November 16, 1988November 16, 1979
